title: clematis orientalis subsp. simensis
intro: Clematis orientalis subsp. simensis, also known as Ethiopian clematis, is a plant species belonging to the Clematis genus and native to Ethiopia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Clematis orientalis subsp. simensis include the potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
